entries.en-US:
---
name: frontend-design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications and the visual direction matters as much as the code quality.
origin: ECC
---
entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: frontend-design
description: 创建独特、生产级的前端界面，具备高设计质量。当用户要求构建网页组件、页面或应用程序，且视觉方向与代码质量同等重要时使用。
origin: ECC
---

entries.en-US: Use this when the task is not just "make it work" but "make it look designed."
entries.zh-Hans: 当任务不仅仅是“让它能用”，而是“让它看起来经过设计”时，使用此技能。

entries.en-US: This skill is for product pages, dashboards, app shells, components, or visual systems that need a clear point of view instead of generic AI-looking UI.
entries.zh-Hans: 此技能适用于产品页面、仪表板、应用外壳、组件或视觉系统，这些需要清晰的观点，而非通用的、看起来像AI生成的UI。

entries.en-US:
- building a landing page, dashboard, or app surface from scratch
- upgrading a bland interface into something intentional and memorable
- translating a product concept into a concrete visual direction
- implementing a frontend where typography, composition, and motion matter
entries.zh-Hans:
* 从零开始构建着陆页、仪表板或应用界面
* 将平淡的界面升级为有意图且令人难忘的界面
* 将产品概念转化为具体的视觉方向
* 实现一个排版、构图和动效都很重要的前端

entries.en-US: Pick a direction and commit to it.
entries.zh-Hans: 选择一个方向并坚持执行。

entries.en-US: Safe-average UI is usually worse than a strong, coherent aesthetic with a few bold choices.
entries.zh-Hans: 安全平庸的UI通常比具有一些大胆选择、强烈且连贯的美学更糟糕。

entries.en-US:
- purpose
- audience
- emotional tone
- visual direction
- one thing the user should remember
entries.zh-Hans:
* 目的
* 受众
* 情感基调
* 视觉方向
* 用户应该记住的一件事

entries.en-US:
- brutally minimal
- editorial
- industrial
- luxury
- playful
- geometric
- retro-futurist
- soft and organic
- maximalist
entries.zh-Hans:
* 极致简约
* 编辑风格
* 工业风格
* 奢华风格
* 趣味风格
* 几何风格
* 复古未来主义
* 柔和有机风格
* 极繁主义

entries.en-US: Do not mix directions casually. Choose one and execute it cleanly.
entries.zh-Hans: 不要随意混合方向。选择一个并清晰地执行。

entries.en-US:
- type hierarchy
- color variables
- spacing rhythm
- layout logic
- motion rules
- surface / border / shadow treatment
entries.zh-Hans:
* 字体层级
* 颜色变量
* 间距节奏
* 布局逻辑
* 动效规则
* 表面/边框/阴影处理

entries.en-US: Use CSS variables or the project's token system so the interface stays coherent as it grows.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用CSS变量或项目的令牌系统，以便界面在扩展时保持连贯。

entries.en-US:
- asymmetry when it sharpens hierarchy
- overlap when it creates depth
- strong whitespace when it clarifies focus
- dense layouts only when the product benefits from density
entries.zh-Hans:
* 当不对称能强化层级时，使用不对称
* 当重叠能创造深度时，使用重叠
* 当强留白能明确焦点时，使用强留白
* 仅当产品受益于密度时，才使用密集布局

entries.en-US: Avoid defaulting to a symmetrical card grid unless it is clearly the right fit.
entries.zh-Hans: 除非明显合适，否则避免默认使用对称的卡片网格。

entries.en-US:
- reveal hierarchy
- stage information
- reinforce user action
- create one or two memorable moments
entries.zh-Hans:
* 揭示层级
* 分阶段展示信息
* 强化用户操作
* 创造一两个令人难忘的时刻

entries.en-US: Do not scatter generic micro-interactions everywhere. One well-directed load sequence is usually stronger than twenty random hover effects.
entries.zh-Hans: 不要到处散布通用的微交互。一个精心设计的加载序列通常比二十个随机的悬停效果更有效。

entries.en-US:
- pick fonts with character
- pair a distinctive display face with a readable body face when appropriate
- avoid generic defaults when the page is design-led
entries.zh-Hans:
* 选择有特色的字体
* 在适当的时候，将独特的展示字体与易读的正文字体配对
* 当页面以设计为主导时，避免使用通用的默认字体

entries.en-US:
- commit to a clear palette
- one dominant field with selective accents usually works better than evenly weighted rainbow palettes
- avoid cliché purple-gradient-on-white unless the product genuinely calls for it
entries.zh-Hans:
* 坚持使用清晰的调色板
* 一个主导色域加上选择性点缀色，通常比权重均匀的彩虹调色板效果更好
* 避免使用陈词滥调的紫色渐变配白色背景，除非产品确实需要它

entries.en-US:
- gradients
- meshes
- textures
- subtle noise
- patterns
- layered transparency
entries.zh-Hans:
* 渐变
* 网格
* 纹理
* 细微噪点
* 图案
* 分层透明度

entries.en-US: Flat empty backgrounds are rarely the best answer for a product-facing page.
entries.zh-Hans: 对于面向产品的页面，平坦空旷的背景很少是最佳答案。

entries.en-US:
- break the grid when the composition benefits from it
- use diagonals, offsets, and grouping intentionally
- keep reading flow obvious even when the layout is unconventional
entries.zh-Hans:
* 当构图受益时，打破网格
* 有意图地使用对角线、偏移和分组
* 即使布局非常规，也要保持阅读流程的清晰

entries.en-US:
- interchangeable SaaS hero sections
- generic card piles with no hierarchy
- random accent colors without a system
- placeholder-feeling typography
- motion that exists only because animation was easy to add
entries.zh-Hans:
* 可互换的SaaS英雄区域
* 没有层级的通用卡片堆
* 没有系统的随机强调色
* 感觉像占位符的排版
* 仅仅因为动画容易添加而存在的动效

entries.en-US:
- preserve the established design system when working inside an existing product
- match technical complexity to the visual idea
- keep accessibility and responsiveness intact
- frontends should feel deliberate on desktop and mobile
entries.zh-Hans:
* 在现有产品内部工作时，保留已建立的设计系统
* 使技术复杂度与视觉创意相匹配
* 保持可访问性和响应性
* 前端在桌面和移动设备上都应显得经过深思熟虑

entries.en-US:
- the interface has a clear visual point of view
- typography and spacing feel intentional
- color and motion support the product instead of decorating it randomly
- the result does not read like generic AI UI
- the implementation is production-grade, not just visually interesting
entries.zh-Hans:
* 界面具有清晰的视觉观点
* 排版和间距感觉是有意图的
* 颜色和动效支持产品，而非随意装饰
* 结果看起来不像通用的AI生成的UI
* 实现是生产级的，而不仅仅是视觉上有趣
